Speedup: 0.05349%                                                                                        \n          The access patterns for writes to compressible memory are not well suited for the L2 Compression unit. Speedup: 0.00563%                                                                                        \n          The access patterns for writes to compressible memory are not well suited for the L2 Compression unit.
